summary_en: 100,000 shares (1.43% of S/O) to be acquired via ToSTNeT-3 on May 18, 2026 at ¥2,190/share ceiling. Block execution within broader ¥500M program authorizing up to 200,000 shares through Mar 31, 2027.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition of Treasury Stock via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Yoshicon Co., Ltd. announced on May 15, 2026 that its board has approved a block acquisition of 100,000 treasury shares (1.43% of shares outstanding) via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading on May 18, 2026 at a ceiling price of ¥2,190 per share. The acquisition results will be disclosed after the 8:45 AM trading session closes. This block execution is part of a broader shareholder authority approved on April 30, 2026, authorizing the acquisition of up to 200,000 shares (2.86% of S/O) for a total amount not exceeding ¥500 million during the period from May 1, 2026 through March 31, 2027. The company notes that execution is subject to market conditions and may be partial or cancelled entirely.
